title: 20th Century Girl
tmdbOverview: In 1999, a teen girl keeps close tabs on a boy in school on behalf of her deeply smitten best friend – then she gets swept up in a love story of her own.
synopsis: 20th Century Girl is a 2022 romance, drama and k-drama film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
